---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: now
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"
params:
  title:      "BOEM Marine Sensitivity Report"
  areas_json: "[]"
  ver:        "v6"
  format:     "html"
  api_base:   "https://api.marinesensitivity.org"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
    format-links: false
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    lof: true
    lot: true
  docx:
    # reference-doc: "../workflows/libs/ESP Report Template 2025_1 tech.docx"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    lof: true
    lot: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(msens)
  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(terra)
  library(purrr)
  library(jsonlite)
  library(yaml)
  library(knitr)
})

is_html  <- params$format == "html"
api_base <- params$api_base

areas <- jsonlite::fromJSON(params$areas_json, simplifyVector = FALSE)
if (length(areas) == 0) {
  stop("No areas provided. Pass `areas_json` as a JSON array of ",
       '[{"label":..,"kind":"wkt"|"pra","value":..}].')
}

# Program Area polygons: read the versioned gpkg matching params$ver —
# same source used to build the public pmtiles, but without tile
# fragmentation issues.
dir_data <- switch(
  Sys.info()[["sysname"]],
  "Darwin" = "~/My Drive/projects/msens/data",
  "Linux"  = "/share/data")
pra_gpkg <- file.path(
  dir_data, "derived", params$ver,
  paste0("ply_programareas_2026_", params$ver, ".gpkg"))
ply_pra <- if (any(purrr::map_chr(areas, "kind") == "pra")) {
  sf::st_read(pra_gpkg, quiet = TRUE)
}

area_to_sf <- function(a) {
  if (a$kind == "pra") {
    ply_pra |>
      dplyr::filter(programarea_key == a$value) |>
      sf::st_geometry() |>
      sf::st_as_sf()
  } else {
    sf::st_as_sfc(a$value, crs = 4326) |>
      sf::st_as_sf()
  }
}

con       <- msens::sdm_db_con(version = params$ver, read_only = TRUE)
r_cell_id <- msens::cell_id_raster()[["cell_id"]]

# preserve kind/value alongside label so the child chunk can build
# per-area download URLs for the /species.csv endpoint.
areas_data <- purrr::map(areas, function(a) {
  ply   <- area_to_sf(a)
  cells <- msens::cells_in_polygon(ply, r_cell_id)
  list(
    label  = a$label,
    kind   = a$kind,
    value  = a$value,
    ply    = ply,
    cells  = cells,
    scores = msens::scores_for_cells(con, cells),
    spp    = msens::species_for_cells(con, cells))
})

# combined sf used by the Map section
all_areas <- do.call(
  rbind,
  purrr::map(areas_data, function(ad) {
    sf::st_sf(label = ad$label, geometry = sf::st_geometry(ad$ply))
  }))
```

## Parameters

```{r}
#| label: print-params
cat(yaml::as.yaml(list(
  title   = params$title,
  ver     = params$ver,
  format  = params$format,
  n_areas = length(areas),
  areas   = purrr::map(areas_data, function(ad) {
    info <- list(
      label      = ad$label,
      kind       = ad$kind,
      n_cells    = nrow(ad$cells),
      mean_score = round(msens::mean_score(ad$scores), 1))
    # drawn polygons: show the actual WKT vertices
    if (identical(ad$kind, "wkt")) info$wkt <- ad$value
    # Program Area: show the key
    if (identical(ad$kind, "pra")) info$programarea_key <- ad$value
    info
  })
)))
```

## Map

```{r}
#| label: map-html
#| eval: !expr is_html
# mapgl::maplibre() is used instead of mapboxgl(), which does not
# render inside Quarto documents (walkerke/mapgl#3).
mapgl::maplibre(
  bounds = sf::st_bbox(all_areas)
) |>
  mapgl::add_fill_layer(
    id           = "areas",
    source       = all_areas,
    fill_color   = "#3388ff",
    fill_opacity = 0.4,
    tooltip      = "label")
```

```{r}
#| label: map-static
#| eval: !expr '!is_html'
#| fig-cap: "Areas of interest."
msens::ggmap_areas(all_areas)
```

```{r}
#| label: scores-header
#| output: asis
cat("## Plot of Scores\n\n")
if (is_html) cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
res <- purrr::map_chr(areas_data, function(ad) {
  knitr::knit_child(
    "report_area_child.qmd",
    envir  = rlang::env(ad = ad, section = "scores", is_html = is_html),
    quiet  = TRUE)
})
cat(res, sep = "\n")
if (is_html) cat("\n:::\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: species-header
#| output: asis
cat("\n## Summary of Species\n\n")
if (is_html) cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
res <- purrr::map_chr(areas_data, function(ad) {
  knitr::knit_child(
    "report_area_child.qmd",
    envir  = rlang::env(
      ad       = ad,
      section  = "species",
      is_html  = is_html,
      api_base = api_base,
      ver      = params$ver),
    quiet  = TRUE)
})
cat(res, sep = "\n")
if (is_html) cat("\n:::\n")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
